effect_entries.effect: Ignore les effets des Talents des Pokémon adverses et capacités qui attirent les capacités.
effect_entries.short_effect: Ignore les capacités et talents qui attirent les capacités.

effect_entries.effect: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon’s Abilities and moves that draw in moves.
effect_entries.short_effect: Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.
